---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is not working correctly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Example:** "When I submit a fish estimate, the page shows a blank screen instead of confirming my submission."

---

## Steps to Reproduce

Please list exactly what you did before the bug appeared:

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap / click on '...'
3. Fill in '...'
4. See error

---

## Expected Behavior

What did you expect to happen?

---

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened? (Include error messages if any.)

---

## Screenshots

If possible, attach a screenshot showing the problem.

---

## Device & Environment

| Field | Your Answer |
|-------|------------|
| Device type | Phone / Tablet / Computer |
| Device model | e.g., Samsung Galaxy A14 |
| Browser | e.g., Chrome, Safari |
| App version / date | e.g., 2025-07-01 |
| Your role | Admin / Officer / Employee |
| Which cage (if applicable) | e.g., Cage 2 |

---

## Additional Context

Any other information that might be helpful (e.g., did it happen only once, or every time?).
